test.note: 460 passed, 2 failed — both failures are pre-existing AuthGate tests documented in AGENTS.md 'Known Pre-Existing Issues'. No new test failures.

lint.note: 50 errors, 12 warnings total. AGENTS.md documents 47 pre-existing errors + 8 warnings. New from onboarding-polish features: AuthGate.tsx has 3 conditional hooks errors (pre-existing from foundation's thirdweb-wallet-auth, not new to this milestone), Integrations.tsx has 1 warning (rowMap useMemo suggestion). No new blocking lint issues from this milestone.

nonBlockingIssues.description: MCP server list uses array index as React key. Low impact for small lists.

company_id and agent_id not persisted to user_onboarding for mid-onboarding resume. Step number is restored but context IDs are lost — user sees fallback UI and must redo company/agent creation on refresh. Primary flow works correctly.
No idempotency guard on company creation in CompanySetup.tsx. Navigating back to step 0 after refresh could create duplicate company row.
rowMap should be wrapped in useMemo to stabilize useCallback dependencies (lint warning). Doesn't cause bugs since callbacks only fire on user click.
Reset Onboarding button is enabled even when wallet_address is null. The mutation silently no-ops but UX could be clearer with a disabled state.

appliedUpdates.description: Added VITE_DEV_SKIP_ONBOARDING env var documentation to environment.md, with notes on dev bypass behavior (VITE_DEV_SKIP_AUTH skips both auth+onboarding, VITE_DEV_SKIP_ONBOARDING skips only onboarding)
Added OnboardingGate to the App Structure section of architecture.md, documenting the new auth chain: ThirdwebProvider > AuthGate > OnboardingGate > Routes

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance to centralize React Query keys in a shared constants file (e.g., src/lib/query-keys.ts) instead of using scattered string literals. Keys like 'sidebar-agents', 'agents-list', 'agents-picker', 'agency-snapshot' are duplicated across multiple files, creating typo-based cache invalidation risks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: settings-polish review found 'sidebar-agents' used in 3 files (NewAgent.tsx, CeoAgentCreation.tsx, useSidebarAgents.ts) as plain strings. Other agent query keys are similarly scattered.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce in synthesis-worker skill that npm run lint MUST be run as part of verification, even if pre-existing lint errors are known. Workers should verify no NEW lint errors were introduced by their feature. The onboarding-flow worker skipped lint entirely.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: onboarding-flow review found lint was not run per skill procedure. Handoff verification has 4 commands but no lint. AGENTS.md already documents 47 pre-existing lint errors which may discourage workers from running it.

rejectedObservations.observation: Hermes adapter __hermes_extras__ pattern for storing adapter config in envBindings
rejectedObservations.reason: Adapter-specific implementation detail, not systemic. Only one adapter uses this pattern; no action needed unless more adapters adopt it.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed synthesis-worker skill procedure correctly (hermes-adapter)
JSONB column casting pattern for integrations config
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in environment.md under 'Supabase JSONB Column Typing'.
Not systemic enough to document. This is the natural Supabase pattern for single-tenant apps.

rejectedObservations.observation: Custom CompanySettings interface vs Database types (settings-polish)
rejectedObservations.reason: AGENTS.md already says 'Prefer using Database types'. No additional guidance needed.
